_comment: Baseline for audit-text-html-ratio.mjs. Numbers must only DECREASE — this gate is a ratchet. Bumped on 2026-04-28 to absorb the SPA-style job-card refactor (commit affb542cc) which added Tailwind markup to job-listing SEO pages without proportional text content increase. job-board: 160→760 (+600), spa-other: 10–20 (+10) with ~1% headroom. Follow-up TODO: add commuter-context prose to the SPA-style card template in build-plugins/jobsSeoPagesPlugin.ts to bring the ratio back above 10% — this baseline bump is a temporary unblock per orchestrator user request 2026-04-28, not a permanent acceptance.
